text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has come once again. After what
happened last year, Gold Ship is trying to play it
cool this time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But youth is not so easily tamed. Gold Ship goes
out like a light again and arrives at summer camp
deep in dreamland.
